description: The adidas Libria slides you into that leisure-bound stride with a simple thong design to hold your foot in place, and a quick-drying EVA upper when things get a little wet and wild. UpperUpper made of suede and textile for enhanced breathability and durabilityThong shaped straps with buckle at the front, elastic around the heel to lock the foot in place comfortablyMidsoleTextile lined insole for soft feelEVA injected midsole for lightweight comfortArched footbed for ergonomic FitOutsole Engineered with Traxion technology for incredible traction across all terrainsRectangular and anatomically placed ridges below the lateral and medial foot for enhanced grip and stabilityWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
